name: server-messages
description: Broadcasts scheduled server announcements using sequential or weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: Messages to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName}. Unknown placeholders are left unchanged. Weight only affects random order. Limit 100 messages. Message text must include at least one non-whitespace character.

text.description: The message text to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName}. Unknown placeholders are left unchanged. Whitespace-only messages are rejected at install time.

weight.description: Relative frequency in random weighted shuffle-bag mode. Must be an integer from 1 to 100. Invalid weights are rejected at install time.

order.description: Broadcast order. Random uses a weighted shuffle bag.

broadcast.description: Broadcast the next configured server message
